programme.title: Django & Juliette Footwear

programme.title: Blue Diamonds

programme.title: Philips in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Simplify your kitchen tasks with Philips. Discover cutting-edge technology designed to enhance your cooking experience. Enjoy seamless efficient and healthy meal preparation with Philips.

programme.title: Nina Leonard Fashion
programme.desc: Effortless Style with Nina Leonard. Mix and match chic pieces for work or weekend. Nina Leonard's refined collection offers endless outfit possibilities. Look sharp and confident from today.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.desc: Exploring answers to life's most difficult questions and recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with students and professors, to give real answers to tough questions about Christianity.

programme.title: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: Cara decides to go on a dating detox. Challenged by her employer to write about it, she books a spontaneous ski getaway with her best friend.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Harald Bluetooth - The Viking and The Wireless Revolution
programme.desc: What does a Viking and wireless technology have in common?- Unity. In this episode we discover the man who inspired the name of Bluetooth technology and how he connected his nation.

programme.title: The Divine Adventure
programme.desc: Are you looking for God's best for your life? Do you have a plan for getting there? Deeply practical and intensely personal, The Divine Adventure unpacks 12 powerful spiritual disciplines that will deepen your intimacy with God.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.sub-title: Castles in Air and Anna Weatherup
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup (The Voice 2013) and Castles In Air.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Joseph had been through many difficulties by the time he was thirty years old, but it is then that we see God's plans for him beginning to come to fruition. Joseph's continued trust in the Lord prepared him to lead.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Hachi: A Dog's Tale
programme.desc: Professor Wilson discovers a lost Akita puppy on his way home. Despite objections from his wife, Hachi endears himself to the family and grows to be Parker's loyal companion.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: Love at First Bark
programme.desc: Portland interior designer Julia Galvins adopts a dog and seeks the help of expert and handsome dog trainer Owen Michaels.

programme.title: Two for the Win
programme.desc: A world champion ski racer and local ski instructor find romance on the slopes as he returns home and prepares for the biggest race of his life.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: God's Method for Melting Hard Hearts
programme.desc: As Joseph's brothers came before him for the first time in Egypt, God was working to bring about their regret of their sin and their repentance through circumstance and Joseph's forgiveness.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Rocky Road to the Will of God/The Consequences of Being Spiritually Shortsighted
programme.desc: Tackling life issues such as parenting, personal crises, emotions, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the Word of God, a belief in his teaching.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Thank You's of Faith Part 2
programme.desc: Pastor Bayless takes a deeper look at the story of Jesus and Lazarus in John 11, encouraging you to cultivate a heart of thankfulness and trust that God hears and answers your prayers.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Under Attack? Put On The Armour Of God!
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand grace and how blessed, favoured and loved they are by their Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: I believe the Lord is speaking to the entire Church right now, inviting us into a deeper level of friendship with Him.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God's rest is something we all need and never have to live without. Learn how to find authentic, internal rest in Christ.

programme.title: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Celebrated English cricketer CT Studd had it all. But Studd realised that fame and flattery would not last, and as a Christian, he sensed a profound calling to forsake the things of the world and live for the world to come.

programme.title: Hillary: Ocean to Sky
programme.desc: Follows Sir Edmund Hillary and his companions on the monumental journey that most New Zealanders don't know about, where Ed nearly lost his life.

programme.title: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: Cara decides to go on a dating detox. Challenged by her employer to write about it, she books a spontaneous ski getaway with her best friend.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham, Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California who toured in Australia in 2012.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Under Attack? Put On The Armour Of God!
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand grace and how blessed, favoured and loved they are by their Father.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A quick-witted terrier finds his position in the household threatened when his master brings home a stray mongrel with no polish.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Terrier Max is back and is coping with some major life changes. This chapter explores the emotional lives of our pets: the deep bond between them and the families that love them.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, nothing is as they expect. They will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: The woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a doubting boy boards a magical train that's headed to the North Pole and Santa Claus's home.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: A true story of a sled dog who braved the Alaskan wilderness to carry life-saving medicine to a remote village in 1925. A remarkable tale of a hero who inspired a nation.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Four spoiled animals from the New York Central Zoo escape with the unintentional help of four fugitive penguins. They subsequently find themselves in Madagascar amidst happy lemurs.

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: It's high-seas adventure when legendary swashbuckler Sinbad, his loyal pooch Spike, and the daring Princess Marina face off against the trickster Goddess of Chaos and her mischievous monsters.

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Megamind is the most brilliant super-villain the world has ever known - and the least successful. But when Metro City is threatened by a new villain, can the world's biggest 'mind' actually save the day?

programme.title: Abducted at an HBCU
programme.desc: College counsellor Ellen becomes concerned when Shannon, a student who's struggling financially, suddenly stops going to classes.

programme.title: Single Black Female
programme.desc: Monica is a young host of one of LA's top morning shows. Reeling from the death of her beloved father and a recent breakup, she's ready to focus on moving forward with her life.

programme.title: Single Black Female 2
programme.desc: Three years after narrowly escaping the murderous clutches of her half-sister Simone, Monica is ready for a fresh start in Seattle as host of the city's number one prime-time investigative program.

programme.title: Single Black Female 3: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Monica is proven innocent after being wrongfully arrested for murder. As charges are dropped, the police shift focus to Simone, who has vanished while bonding with her daughter Joy.

programme.title: Waking Up To Danger
programme.desc: A young mother picks up the pieces after a horrible accident damages her memory. She soon suspects her husband's indiscretions are what caused her suffering and that her family is in danger.

programme.title: Who Killed JonBenet?
programme.desc: Revisit the infamous murder of pint-sized beauty queen JonBenet Ramsey and the lurid details that captivated a nation.

programme.title: Oscar Pistorius: Blade Runner Killer
programme.desc: The true story of the sprint runner and his rise to fame as a Paralympian gold medallist. It all shattered one evening when four bullets were fired and his beautiful girlfriend's life was taken.

programme.title: An Amish Murder
programme.desc: A woman returns to the Amish farming community of her youth, but her peace is shattered when a murder investigation exposes a dark secret that could destroy her.

programme.title: You Can't Take My Daughter
programme.desc: Amy is a law student in Charlotte who is attacked and raped by Demetri, a friend of a friend. Discovering that she is pregnant from the rape, Amy makes a difficult decision to keep the baby.

programme.title: Couples Retreat Murder
programme.desc: Becky and Jim head to a remote couple's retreat to try and save their marriage. However, when a guest goes missing and their host is found dead, they start to wonder who else they're trapped with.

programme.title: Surviving The Sleepover
programme.desc: Outspoken teenager Hannah goes to a sleepover at a popular girl's house, not realising she was only invited to be the victim of a prank.

programme.title: Who Is Killing The Cheerleaders?
programme.desc: Ellie, a former cheerleader, returns to her high school as a teacher 10 years after she was nearly killed in a series of brutal slayings on the squad.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Dean's Wife
programme.desc: The devoted wife of a university dean discovers her husband's secret life.

programme.title: Abducted on Prom Night
programme.desc: Against her better judgement, a mother allows her troubled daughter to attend prom, but the night turns into a twisted game of cat-and-mouse as the daughter and her friends are taken hostage.

programme.title: The Boarding School Murders
programme.desc: Foster teen Frankie attends an elite Swiss boarding school. One of her classmates is murdered and everyone is quick to blame Frankie. She must prove innocence before becoming a prime suspect.

programme.title: Beaches
programme.desc: The serendipitous meeting of two young girls on the Venice Boardwalk, who, although worlds apart in lifestyle, embark on an unexpected and lifelong friendship.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: To All a Good Night
programme.desc: After a small-town photographer saves a man's life, she learns he's in town to buy her family's parkland, the location of the annual Christmas celebration.

programme.title: Jeni: Hometown Harvest
programme.desc: This time it's Jeni's turn to show off her culinary skills in her new series Hometown Harvest. Jeni and her friends & family are cooking up some of her favourite foods. Come along as Jeni welcomes you into the family.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Thank You's of Faith Part 2
programme.desc: Pastor Bayless takes a deeper look at the story of Jesus and Lazarus in John 11, encouraging you to cultivate a heart of thankfulness and trust that God hears and answers your prayers.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you in a serious relationship with Christ? On today's program, Joyce teaches on how to enjoy greater intimacy with God.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: To All a Good Night
programme.desc: After a small-town photographer saves a man's life, she learns he's in town to buy her family's parkland, the location of the annual Christmas celebration.

programme.title: Christchurch - Beauty From Ash
programme.desc: Visit Christchurch, New Zealand and take a look at how the Christian community has responded in love and support to those affected by the March 2019 attacks on the Al Noor Mosque and Linwood Islamic Centre.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: Teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: A librarian with a sharp mind for murder, Aurora Teagarden is known around her small town as a master sleuth. When her friend Jane unexpectedly dies, she also leaves a troubling murder mystery haunting her neighbourhood.

programme.title: Secrets of Sacred Architecture
programme.desc: Throughout history, sacred buildings represented the greatest feats of innovative engineering & artistic design. Unlock the elements that make these structures so fascinating and unveil the meaning in religious architecture across the USA.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Draw The Blood Line Of Protection Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand grace and how blessed, favoured and loved they are by their Father.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers and rewards those who show kindness.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: A wedding celebration brings heightened emotions and surprises. Nathan and Elizabeth exchange secrets. Rosemary and Lee pitch Lucas an idea for the future of Hope Valley.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe. A blend of flying, exploring, construction and renovations, camp life, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to discover the mystery of prayer? Today on Enjoying Everyday Life, Joyce Meyer teaches on why heartfelt, persistent prayer is powerful and how it connects us to God, His blessings, and guidance.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: To All a Good Night
programme.desc: After a small-town photographer saves a man's life, she learns he's in town to buy her family's parkland, the location of the annual Christmas celebration.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: Plenty of fun, laughs, adventures and of course, silly songs with Bob the Tomato, Larry the Cucumber and all the Veggie Tales gang. Join them as they share stories from the Bible and learn about God who loves them.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: In AD 203, Perpetua is charged with converting to Christianity and is sent to prison. But her freedom can be secured. All she has to do is offer one pinch of incense in honour to the Roman gods.

programme.title: Ancestors: Old Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the Old Testament. These hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Megamind is the most brilliant super-villain the world has ever known - and the least successful. But when Metro City is threatened by a new villain, can the world's biggest 'mind' actually save the day?

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a radioactive spider bite, a nerdy teen develops keen senses and amazing strength.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king, and Shrek and Fiona have never met. He must undo all he's done to save his world.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are BFFs who accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's the hero named Captain Underpants. They must stop a new teacher who is bent on ridding the world of laughter.

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything
programme.desc: Those vege-eating boys are back! This time they're cabin boys in a pirate theatre and are called upon to put aside their lazy, cowardly ways and help a princess rescue her brother who's been kidnapped.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: After an aptitude test mix-up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. An evil executive then plots to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with a family vacation on a monster cruise ship. While enjoying their time, the unexpected happens when Drac falls for the dangerous captain of the ship.

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of BOB, Link, Dr Cockroach, and Susan as they learn to adapt to a new world and work side-by-side.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
programme.desc: Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Blurp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into ... mouse burgers!

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: When a Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home, he finds himself lost and alone at Paddington Station. This charming family comedy is based on the classic children's books.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Beaches
programme.desc: The serendipitous meeting of two young girls on the Venice Boardwalk, who, although worlds apart in lifestyle, embark on an unexpected and lifelong friendship.

programme.title: Amish Stud: The Eli Weaver Story
programme.desc: A man who calls himself Amish Stud plots with his mistress to murder his wife, to the horror of his conservative Amish community.

programme.title: Taken in Montana
programme.desc: When her parents go missing during a family vacation, a teen tries to put the clues together to find them, but she may be trusting the wrong people for help.

programme.title: Murder in Nashville
programme.desc: A woman gets swept up in a whirlwind romance with the son of a wealthy power player in the country music scene.

programme.title: My Sister's Serial Killer Boyfriend
programme.desc: Maddie, a local reporter investigating a series of killings targeting similar looking women, is caught off guard when her younger sister Olivia is attacked in her own home.

programme.title: Expecting Amish
programme.desc: When an eventful Rumspringa leads to an unintended pregnancy, Amish teen Hannah must choose between returning to faith and family or beginning a new life elsewhere.

programme.title: Revenge For My Mother
programme.desc: Audrey teaches postnatal fitness to a group of mums who bring their baby strollers to the park, but when her recently-hired assistant secretly starts exacting revenge, Audrey's perfect world erupts into madness.

programme.title: Surviving The Sleepover
programme.desc: Outspoken teenager Hannah goes to a sleepover at a popular girl's house, not realising she was only invited to be the victim of a prank.

programme.title: The Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: After struggling through a painful divorce, April decides to get back into the dating game and is swept off her feet by the handsome Jacob, who is hiding a dark side and a wife.

programme.title: Cheerleader Nightmare
programme.desc: When her cheating boyfriend is accused of murdering the head cheerleader, Sophie becomes involved in a race to discover the truth before it's too late.

programme.title: Blonde and Blonder
programme.desc: When two dimwitted, blonde bombshells are mistaken for the underworld's most cunning assassins, they are approached with a lucrative contract to take out the head of the Chinese mafia.

programme.title: Burned By Love
programme.desc: A divorcee meets her seemingly perfect match on an online dating site, only to discover he's a scammer who's looking to destroy her life.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: A Kidnapping in Amish Country
programme.desc: When an Amish woman discovers her daughter has been kidnapped, she turns to the only person who can help her estranged best friend, who has left the Amish way of life.

programme.title: The Killer Is Calling
programme.desc: When a mysterious killer targets a remote island town, a veteran 911 operator tries to uncover his motives and save her community, one emergency call at a time.

programme.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programme.desc: A lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger who's smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasn't the only secret he failed to mention.

programme.title: Never too Late to Celebrate
programme.desc: Career-focused dentist Camila is reluctant to celebrate her 30th birthday but inspired by Javi, a Spanish teacher, the two plan a 'quinceanera' themed party to honour her Hispanic heritage.

programme.title: Greater

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Draw The Blood Line Of Protection Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand grace and how blessed, favoured and loved they are by their Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to discover the mystery of prayer? Today on Enjoying Everyday Life, Joyce Meyer teaches on why heartfelt, persistent prayer is powerful and how it connects us to God, His blessings, and guidance.

programme.title: Never too Late to Celebrate
programme.desc: Career-focused dentist Camila is reluctant to celebrate her 30th birthday but inspired by Javi, a Spanish teacher, the two plan a 'quinceanera' themed party to honour her Hispanic heritage.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a long-needed mums' night out. But in order to enjoy high heels, adult conversation and food not served in a paper bag, they need their husbands to watch the kids for three hours.

programme.title: Bernie The Dolphin
programme.desc: Bernie the Dolphin is a family adventure about a brother and sister in St Augustine, Florida, who befriend a badly sunburned dolphin separated from his family and uncover a secret plan.

programme.title: My Why
programme.desc: Mywhy.tv is a project that is designed to bring the message of Jesus to the forefront of the pop culture conversation through the art of storytelling.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.sub-title: Draw The Blood Line Of Protection Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand grace and how blessed, favoured and loved they are by their Father.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids to follow along and get into God's Word!

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour TV talk show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: At The Table is where we share, laugh and dream. Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration. Which direction are you heading?

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Thank You's of Faith Part 2
programme.desc: Pastor Bayless takes a deeper look at the story of Jesus and Lazarus in John 11, encouraging you to cultivate a heart of thankfulness and trust that God hears and answers your prayers.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: I believe the Lord is speaking to the entire Church right now, inviting us into a deeper level of friendship with Him.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: With news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, The 700 Club shares powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you see prayer as a privilege or a duty? Today, Joyce teaches how to confidently ask, seek, and pray with a heart aligned to God's will.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Rocky Road to the Will of God/The Consequences of Being Spiritually Shortsighted
programme.desc: Tackling life issues such as parenting, personal crises, emotions, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the Word of God, a belief in his teaching.

programme.title: Never too Late to Celebrate
programme.desc: Career-focused dentist Camila is reluctant to celebrate her 30th birthday but inspired by Javi, a Spanish teacher, the two plan a 'quinceanera' themed party to honour her Hispanic heritage.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham, Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California who toured in Australia in 2012.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Braving the Big Battle with the Baroness
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome. It's the Blello Show! Let's go!

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood, they discover the camp has everything it needs, except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker struggles to juggle his life with his Spider-Man persona as a new foe emerges: the deranged scientist, Otto Octavius.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy neighbourhood with picket fences and rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. In the cellar is a hideout where a dastardly villain is plotting a huge heist - he wants to steal the moon!

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When a cute alien lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own race, he forms an unlikely friendship with a brave little girl who's on a quest of her own.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Two kids playing a magic jungle board game release a man trapped in it for 26 years, and a host of dangers that can only be stopped by finishing the game.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A quick-witted terrier finds his position in the household threatened when his master brings home a stray mongrel with no polish.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: Oscar is a fast-talking little fish whose big dreams have a habit of landing him in hot water. Lenny is a great white shark with a sensitive side and a secret: he's a vegetarian.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programme.desc: A lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger who's smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasn't the only secret he failed to mention.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: Mommy Meanest
programme.desc: A teenage girl is relentlessly cyber-bullied, only to find out the horrific texts are from her own mother.

programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: A woman's world comes crashing down when another woman shows up at her doorstep claiming she's married to her husband.

programme.title: Murder at the Derby
programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job at a prestigious horse stable under Jennifer's mentorship, but tensions rise when Jennifer's jealous brother puts everyone's lives at risk.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend from college working aboard a luxury yacht in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Wrath: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Single lawyer Chastity Jeffries believes she's found her perfect match in Xavier Collins, but his obsessive love forces her to confront how far she's strayed from her own principles.

programme.title: The Killer Inside: The Ruth Finley Story
programme.desc: The kidnapping and sudden reappearance of Ruth Finley leave investigators scrambling for answers.

programme.title: A Lifeguard's Obsession
programme.desc: When a lonely, awkward lifeguard saves a well-known woman from drowning, he believes he's earned a place in her life and in her heart.

programme.title: She Went Missing
programme.desc: A reporter's long-dormant stalker re-emerges when she returns to her hometown to investigative the disappearance of her childhood best friend.

programme.title: The Girl Who Wasn't Dead
programme.desc: When 15-year-old Erica vanishes without a trace, authorities believe she may have been the victim of a serial killer.

programme.title: The Bear Lake Murders
programme.desc: A sheriff teams up with a detective to uncover the truth behind a series of annual deaths in a resort town. Their investigation leads them to believe that a killer is preying on holidaymakers.

programme.title: Sins of My Husband
programme.desc: After police kill serial killer Tony Dandridge, his wife, Katherine, denies knowledge of his crimes. But when a victim's mother supports Katherine, it turns into a dangerous game of truth and lies.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a boat to Canada, but when it sinks, she's rescued by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she heals, Jess realises she's fallen into another trap.

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: After a near-fatal house fire, Natalie and Loughlin, a struggling married couple, are manipulated by an obsessive firefighter named Jack, who schemes to pit the couple against each other.

programme.title: Trapped in the Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: Lured into an unwelcome reunion at a vacant ski lodge, former college friends find themselves in a fight for their lives when they become the target of an unseen adversary.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Good Guys Doing Good

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: The annual evangelism conference led by Ray Comfort and the Living Waters crew.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you see prayer as a privilege or a duty? Today, Joyce teaches how to confidently ask, seek, and pray with a heart aligned to God's will.

programme.title: Bernie the Dolphin 2
programme.desc: The kids are thrilled that Bernie has come back. But so has their old enemy Winston, who's about to kidnap the talented dolphin. Kevin and Holly must rescue their splashy friend before it's too late.

programme.title: The Fatherless Epidemic
programme.desc: A short documentary addressing one of the most pressing issue in Western society - The Fatherless Epidemic. While everyone attempts to solve societal ills by treating symptoms, the church is being called to fight the issue at its roots.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Rocky Road to the Will of God/The Consequences of Being Spiritually Shortsighted
programme.desc: Tackling life issues such as parenting, personal crises, emotions, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the Word of God, a belief in his teaching.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK Theologian, Cambridge Scholar, Pastor and Bible Teacher David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: The Postables embark on a road trip to locate a talented young singer/songwriter hiding from her past. As they track down and reunite the family, Oliver receives a box of letters from his father to help prepare him.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Draw The Blood Line Of Protection Pt 3 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Night Owls and Early Birds is a new topical Bible study show from the creators of Owlegories. Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Today Pastor Peter Mortlock teaches how we are to follow the Lord our Shepherd and grow in wisdom and integrity through His words.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: Experiencing failure of some kind is an unavoidable part of business. Expecting it to come your way at some point - big or small - is an important part of building business success.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Kels hits the streets of Brooklyn to find the best BBQ the Big Apple has to offer while Kalani flies to Texas to see if NY holds up to a classic Texas smokehouse. Allie finds herself on a walking tour with a movie star.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: God's Method for Melting Hard Hearts
programme.desc: As Joseph's brothers came before him for the first time in Egypt, God was working to bring about their regret of their sin and their repentance through circumstance and Joseph's forgiveness.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Prayer is a vital necessity! Today, Joyce breaks down the different types of prayer to help you grow spiritually and navigate every season with God's guidance.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Drive Thru History
programme.desc: Dave Stotts explores the amazing lives of the very first Christians. Using the Book of Acts as a roadmap, Dave travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, places, and events that launched the faith.

programme.title: Jesus the Game Changer
programme.desc: Jesus taught that each individual had inherent value - they were loved by God, and worthy of love and attention. Jesus viewed people as not only members of families, castes or communities but as being individuals of worth.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Good Guys Doing Good
programme.desc: Tim Bisagno sets out on a journey across the USA to find men of God serving the Lord in adventurous and unique ways. Follow Tim as he travels, participates, laughs, cries, honours and showcases Good Guys doing Gods work!

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free
programme.desc: Join Young & Free in the kitchen as they serve up a feast of music videos and a side of laughs.

programme.title: OK TV
programme.desc: Brendon and Cathie have poured their 30 years of experience with kids in schools and in ministry and the great goals of the local church into a energetic show that will engage the next generation.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: TV One Life
programme.desc: Between the humour, music and unfiltered ministry, the message is clear, "God can change your life"! Fasten your seatbelts for this roller coaster ride of a show!

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: I believe the Lord is speaking to the entire Church right now, inviting us into a deeper level of friendship with Him.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Snow White and the Huntsman
programme.desc: In a twist to the fairy tale, the evil Queen Ravenna orders the Huntsman to capture Snow White so she can rule eternally; however, he trains her in the art of war to defeat the wicked ruler.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: The web-spinning superhero must battle his own demons and a barrage of new villains including Sandman and Venom.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ace detective Harry Goodman goes missing, prompting his son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee helps a stressed young mother trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Terrier Max is back and is coping with some major life changes. This chapter explores the emotional lives of our pets: the deep bond between them and the families that love them.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: Hidden World
programme.desc: What began as an unlikely friendship between an adolescent Viking and a fearsome Night Fury dragon has become an epic adventure spanning their lives.

programme.title: Dragonheart: Vengeance
programme.desc: After his family is killed, Lukas sets out on an epic quest for revenge, forming an unlikely trio with an ice breathing dragon and a swashbuckling mercenary.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, nothing is as they expect. They will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: When a single mother and her two kids arrive in a small town, they begin to discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

programme.title: Migration
programme.desc: The Mallard family embark on a journey south for the winter to Jamaica via New York City, only for their well-laid plans to go awry, leading to new friends and unknown horizons.

programme.title: Trapped in the Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: Lured into an unwelcome reunion at a vacant ski lodge, former college friends find themselves in a fight for their lives when they become the target of an unseen adversary.

programme.title: Vanished in Yosemite
programme.desc: While on vacation in Yosemite, sisters Katrina and Jennifer meet the perfect guy Rick. Katrina is certain she has met Mr Right, however, when Katrina goes missing, Jennifer suspects kidnapping.

programme.title: Abducted In The Everglades
programme.desc: A college student vanishes during spring break in Miami. Her mother, with help from a local boatman, braves dangers to urgently search for her and unravel the mystery.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Dean's Wife
programme.desc: The devoted wife of a university dean discovers her husband's secret life.

programme.title: Spinning Out Of Control
programme.desc: Infatuated and obsessed with a fitness instructor, Natalie hatches a devious plan to eliminate everyone in the young woman's life so she can have her all to herself.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: A pastor's wife seeks solace from her marital woes by having an affair with a pool boy. The fling quickly upsets the idyllic facade of the community, reigniting old jealousies.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: A friend encourages Monica to start a crowdsource fund to pay for her daughter's hospital bills. However, when a seemingly generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: The true story of Britney Jean Spears, one of the bestselling teenage music artists of all-time, whose dating life and public emotional breakdowns were the subjects of a worldwide media frenzy.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: A woman moves to a new town and opens her own gourmet restaurant after escaping from an abusive relationship. However, she soon finds herself in a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Vanished in Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing after her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents soon find some unexpected help as they embark on a desperate search to find her.

programme.title: Greed: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: When interior decorator Zuri Maxwell meets a handsome benefactor and entrepreneur, she compromises the values and morals that should guide her, in an effort to be part of his world.

programme.title: Am I A Serial Killer?
programme.desc: A teenage girl visits her mum on death row and gets lured into a dangerous trap to take the fall for her mother's crimes.

programme.title: Stalked by My Amish Boyfriend
programme.desc: Carly develops a relationship with Abram, a young Amish man. Their seemingly innocent courtship soon takes a dark turn when Abram refuses to return home.

programme.title: Trapped in Her Dorm Room
programme.desc: College student Erin becomes trapped in her dorm room during Spring Break when a classmate's harmless adoration turns into a dangerous obsession.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, is caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him after a prison escape.

programme.title: Date at Your Own Risk
programme.desc: Eva becomes horrified when she reads an online post where other women accuse her ex-fiance of harassment and aggressive behaviour.

programme.title: One in Every Japanese

programme.title: Hit the Road
programme.desc: Take a drive in Fukushima! 13 years since the disaster, see its rejuvenated community and daily life. Visit the rest stop emblematic of this resilience and sense the locals' unyielding spirit.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: We observe "Red Fuji" and "Black Fuji," 2 dramatically different views of Japan's most famous mountain, captured by the artist Hokusai. What did Mount Fuji mean to the people of Edo?

programme.title: Today's Close-Up
programme.desc: Culinary expert Doi Yoshiharu shares his 'find what's just right for you' philosophy of simple home cooking. Can letting go of perfection bring more joy and freedom to the kitchen? Let's get cooking!

programme.title: Document 72 Hours
programme.desc: In the mountains of Fukushima, there's an ice cream shop that people go to even during winter. This shop has been with the locals for 3 decades. We spent 3 days listening to the stories of visitors.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: I believe the Lord is speaking to the entire Church right now, inviting us into a deeper level of friendship with Him.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Tasha Homan is a fashionista, international model and beauty therapist. But success did not come naturally, growing up in the Brooklyn Projects; it took uncompromising belief in herself, and a big dream.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: A wedding celebration brings heightened emotions and surprises. Nathan and Elizabeth exchange secrets. Rosemary and Lee pitch Lucas an idea for the future of Hope Valley.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: Set in the stunning Kimberly, Western Australia the ladies head to Beagle Bay to shine a light on the youth suicide rate amongst the Aboriginal community, whilst exploring the truth in Australian culture with Tasha.

programme.title: Always Good News
programme.desc: Monthly update from the Billy Graham Evangelistic Association. Travel around the globe to Estonia, Colombia and Taiwan with Franklin Graham as they witness the impact and change in lives as the host the Festival of Hope.

programme.title: Walking in the Footsteps of Faith
programme.desc: Discover how giants of the faith like Mother Theresa, Martin Luther, and David Livingston lived following Steve walking in their footsteps!

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Draw The Blood Line Of Protection Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Rocky Road to the Will of God/The Consequences of Being Spiritually Shortsighted
programme.desc: Tackling life issues such as parenting, personal crises, emotions, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the Word of God, a belief in his teaching.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Prayer is a vital necessity! Today, Joyce breaks down the different types of prayer to help you grow spiritually and navigate every season with God's guidance.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: A wedding celebration brings heightened emotions and surprises. Nathan and Elizabeth exchange secrets. Rosemary and Lee pitch Lucas an idea for the future of Hope Valley.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: Set in the stunning Kimberly, Western Australia the ladies head to Beagle Bay to shine a light on the youth suicide rate amongst the Aboriginal community, whilst exploring the truth in Australian culture with Tasha.

programme.title: The Luckiest Man: The John Paine Story
programme.desc: A successful entrepreneur, adventurer and family man's inspiring story of hope and transformation in the midst of his 15 year journey with Motor Neurone Disease.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: Judah - David's Training Ground of Faith
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Today Pastor Peter Mortlock teaches how we are to follow the Lord our Shepherd and grow in wisdom and integrity through His words.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Thank You's of Faith Part 2
programme.desc: Pastor Bayless takes a deeper look at the story of Jesus and Lazarus in John 11, encouraging you to cultivate a heart of thankfulness and trust that God hears and answers your prayers.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Draw The Blood Line Of Protection Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help understand grace and how blessed, favoured and loved they are by their Father.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: Dave, upset over not joining his brothers who have gone to war, is resigned to staying at home and taking care of the farm. When a giant pickle is sent to attack his village, Dave relies on God's teachings.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Life Hacks: Pocket tips from the Book of Proverbs Pt10
programme.desc: Marc explores the wisdom of the Book of Proverbs looking at the wisdom that God has provided, so that we can observe it and put it into practice in our day to day lives.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe and is a blend of flying and renovations, camp life, fishing, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Travel with Jeni & Sarah from Michigan to Florida. Sample some great food, visit well known sites and have lots of fun. Most importantly, meet and talk with a host of extraordinary women about identity, purpose, relationships and much more.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Post Natal Depression affects 1 in 5 mothers in Australia. The Be That team discuss the journey through PND and how to best support those who are navigating their way to recovery.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: There are various types of prayer and worship is one of the truest forms! Today, Joyce teaches that worship goes beyond singing, and how we can offer God our hearts and lives in true devotion through worship.

programme.title: Convocation
programme.desc: Weekly Liberty University Campus Convocation services connect students with their Creator through passionate worship and powerful messages firmly rooted in Biblical truth.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: A wedding celebration brings heightened emotions and surprises. Nathan and Elizabeth exchange secrets. Rosemary and Lee pitch Lucas an idea for the future of Hope Valley.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: Set in the stunning Kimberly, Western Australia the ladies head to Beagle Bay to shine a light on the youth suicide rate amongst the Aboriginal community, whilst exploring the truth in Australian culture with Tasha.

programme.title: The Divine Adventure
programme.desc: Are you looking for God's best for your life? Do you have a plan for getting there? Twelve deeply practical and intensely personal, powerful spiritual disciplines that will deepen your intimacy with God.

programme.title: Dot Conner: Webtective
programme.desc: Follows an inquisitive young teenager as she investigates questions about faith as if she is a detective solving a mystery. Dot's cases unfold through the lens of social media and technology.

programme.title: Little Worship Company
programme.desc: Hal, Mr and Mrs Looyah present this Bible- and worship-based series. For children up to 7 years old, ALL THE CREATURES inspires wonder in the amazing animals around us - and the awesome God who made them.

programme.title: Owlegories
programme.desc: Owlegories is an animated series that follows a group of student owls as they travel on adventures learning about nature, faith, and God!

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: Join in the incredible adventures of Christopher and Joy. Superbook teaches children timeless moral truths and life lessons through the captivating, Bible-based adventures of two time-traveling children and their robot friend, Gizmo.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: Migration
programme.desc: The Mallard family embark on a journey south for the winter to Jamaica via New York City, only for their well-laid plans to go awry, leading to new friends and unknown horizons.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: Long before the evil Queen Ravenna was vanquished by Snow White's blade, she watched silently as her sister, Freya, suffered a heartbreaking betrayal and fled their kingdom.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: A young Peter Parker/Spider-Man begins to navigate his new-found identity as the web-slinging superhero.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: The story of the world's first family road trip. After their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home.

programme.title: Tad The Lost Explorer
programme.desc: Due to a fortuitous mix-up, Tad, a dreamy construction worker, is mistaken for a famous archaeologist and sent on an expedition to Peru.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Adventure Island
programme.desc: Dinosaur siblings Buddy, Tiny, Shiny and Don try to reunite with their parents after an earthquake causes theme park robots to go rogue.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: A legendary rivalry re-emerges when Jerry moves into NYC's finest hotel on the eve of the wedding of the century, forcing the desperate event planner to hire Tom to get rid of him.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Megamind is the most brilliant super-villain the world has ever known - and the least successful. But when Metro City is threatened by a new villain, can the world's biggest 'mind' actually save the day?

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy neighbourhood with picket fences and rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. In the cellar is a hideout where a dastardly villain is plotting a huge heist - he wants to steal the moon!

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Caveman Dug, his sidekick, Hognob, and their fearless new friend, Goona, must unite their Stone Age tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A wonderful little girl who happens to be a genius, along with her understanding teacher, outwit the worst parents and the worst school principal imaginable.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: When aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as models for their assaults.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Street-smart Nathan Drake is recruited by seasoned treasure hunter Victor 'Sully' Sullivan to recover a fortune amassed by Ferdinand Magellan, and lost 500 years ago.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood, they discover the camp has everything it needs, except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame.

programme.title: Date at Your Own Risk
programme.desc: Eva becomes horrified when she reads an online post where other women accuse her ex-fiance of harassment and aggressive behaviour.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: A hardworking single mother takes a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition. Things take a dark turn when she encounters a mysterious passenger.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: The Secret Sex Life of a Single Mom
programme.desc: A divorced woman finds sexual liberation through online dating.

programme.title: How to Live Your Best Death
programme.desc: Hoping to go after her dreams, Kristin hires Ashley, a life coach who promises to help her reach her full potential. However, things take a turn when unconventional methods start to wreak havoc,

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. However, one of her friends starts to suspect that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a boat to Canada, but when it sinks, she's rescued by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she heals, Jess realises she's fallen into another trap.

programme.title: Dying to Win
programme.desc: A gymnast gets caught in a web of lies when her mother and stepfather are found murdered in the family home.

programme.title: Husband, Father, Killer
programme.desc: As a teen, Alyssa has a relationship with abusive Steven, but their path takes a dark turn after she has his child and gives her up for adoption.

programme.title: Single Black Female 2
programme.desc: Three years after narrowly escaping the murderous clutches of her half-sister Simone, Monica is ready for a fresh start in Seattle as host of the city's number one prime-time investigative program.

programme.title: Single Black Female 3: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Monica is proven innocent after being wrongfully arrested for murder. As charges are dropped, the police shift focus to Simone, who has vanished while bonding with her daughter Joy.

programme.title: Wife Stalker
programme.desc: Joanna's obsessive fantasy of a perfect life with Leo shatters, forcing her to confront harsh reality and the truth about their relationship, with dire consequences.

programme.title: I Was Octomom
programme.desc: In 2009, Natalie Suleman gives birth to eight children with the help of IVF, only to have her life torn apart, and her identity rebranded by the media.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: Searching for Neverland
programme.desc: Chronicles the intimate moments between Jackson and his children, and documents the professional turbulence that engulfed Jackson, eventually forcing him back to rehearsals for an ill-fated tour.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A reporter who witnesses a brutal murder becomes entangled in a mystery involving conjoined twins who were separated at birth.

programme.title: If There Be Thorns
programme.desc: With Christopher and Cathy Dollanganger living together as man and wife, Cathy's two sons are unaware of the incestuous nature of their parents' relationship.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Kawabe Soichiro is a paleontologist who works with one of the world's leading dinosaur museums in Fukui Prefecture. He has used digital technology to decipher the mysteries of dinosaur fossils.

programme.title: 1/50: People Who Lost A Newborn
programme.desc: 1 in 50 families have lost a child during pregnancy or soon after birth. A couple who lost their second son when two hours old talks about their grief and sorrow, a topic often not discussed in Japan.

programme.title: Hit the Road
programme.desc: Let's take a drive in Saitama and discover its natural beauty and hidden gems. From Omiya, we head to Chichibu to see its famed SL train. En route, we savor local dishes and try washi paper crafting.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: We come across a tranquil, snow-covered Edo cityscape. But there's something in the air: the aroma of foods both sweet and savory that helped the townspeople keep warm in the winter.
